Meet Our Team

The strategists behind Crisp Act Communications.

Mr. Bernard Omwega Osero

Team Lead

A seasoned communications strategist with over three decades of experience in journalism, public relations, and corporate communications. He holds a BA in Political Science and Linguistics from the University of Nairobi and a Master's in Communications from Daystar University. He served as Head of Corporate Communications at Kenya Ports Authority for 26 years and is co-author of Essentials of Public Relations: A Case Study Approach (2024).

Mr. Ayub M. Mwangi

Operations and Strategy

An award-winning communication and public relations professional with over two decades of experience across media, strategic communication, and multimedia production. He holds an MA in Strategic Corporate Communication from Daystar University and a BA in Linguistics and Anthropology from Moi University. Known for his ability to lead multidisciplinary teams and deliver high-impact communication projects.
